# Gcore Gclaw

> Managed OpenClaw service with built-in inference for launching AI agents instantly.

- [Gclaw](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw.md): Managed OpenClaw service with built-in inference for launching AI agents instantly.
- [Getting started](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/getting-started.md): Create and launch a Gclaw AI assistant instance in the Gcore Customer Portal, access the chat interface, and manage instance settings including Restart, Backup, Restore, and Recreate operations.
- [Manage instance](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/manage-instance.md): Manage Gclaw instance restart, backup, restore, and recreation operations via the Settings section in the sidebar; configure data persistence for workspace files, configuration, API keys, skills, and chat history across restart and recreate actions.
- [Configure API keys](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/api-keys.md): Configure API keys for Gclaw coding agents and skills by providing credentials directly in the chat interface for secure storage in instance configuration.

## Integrations
- [Connect Telegram](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/connect-telegram.md): Configure Telegram bot integration with Gclaw AI assistant by creating a bot via BotFather, adding the bot token to OpenClaw configuration, and pairing Telegram accounts using pairing codes in the Gclaw chat interface.
- [Connect Discord](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/connect-discord.md): Configure Gclaw Discord integration by creating a Discord bot application in the Developer Portal, enabling Message Content Intent, copying the bot token, adding it to OpenClaw configuration, and authorizing the bot to Discord servers with Read Messages/View Channels, Send Messages, and Read Message History permissions.
- [Security model](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/security.md): Configure OpenClaw account isolation with dedicated VMs, unique API keys per account, and network isolation from Gcore backend; manage shared security responsibilities including prompt safety, credential protection, third-party bot token security, and agent activity monitoring.
- [Limits and quotas](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/limits.md): View Gclaw inference limits including context window, maximum output, reasoning capability, and account-tier-dependent rate limits on DeepSeek V4 Flash model running on Gcore H200 GPUs.
- [Pricing](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/pricing.md): Gclaw Standard plan costs 30 USD per month with a monthly token bundle and per-token overage billing for DeepSeek V4 Flash during paid beta.
- [SSH access to the Gclaw VM](https://gcore.com/docs/gclaw/ssh-access.md): Obtain SSH access to a Gclaw dedicated VM by generating an SSH key pair, asking the Gclaw assistant to authorize the public key, and connecting as the ubuntu user via the VM IP address.
